trigger.title: Brain Dump to Outline - address CodeRabbit feedback and re-promote
trigger.body:
## Context
Task MC #66 from Build Product backlog.

## Description
Address CodeRabbit's review feedback on the Brain Dump to Outline feature (PR #2274) and resolve the 6 blocking issues:

1. Input bounds validation
2. Fix broken JSON prompt
3. Add Zod validation
4. Button routing fixes
5. Empty argument_map logic
6. Missing re-export

Then re-promote for review.

Label: plan-me
